security.title: Security Protection
security.description: Comprehensive cyber security solutions to protect your business from threats. We provide advanced threat detection, vulnerability assessments, and yearly updates to keep your data safe and secure.

software.title: Software & Update Services
software.description: Keep your systems running smoothly with our professional software maintenance and update services. We handle installations, patches, and upgrades to ensure optimal performance and security compliance.

web.title: Website & Application Services
web.description: Custom website and application development tailored to your business needs. From dynamic websites to powerful mobile apps, we build digital solutions that drive growth and engage your audience.

desktop.title: Desktop Systems with Admin Dashboard
desktop.description: Powerful desktop applications and administrative dashboards designed for business needs. We create robust and large-scale systems with AI to manage complex business operations and financial analytics.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.q1: How long does a typical project take?
faq.a1: Project timelines vary based on scope and complexity. Simple websites typically take 4-6 weeks, while complex applications can take 1-2 months. We'll provide a detailed timeline during consultation.
faq.a2: Yes! We provide comprehensive maintenance packages including updates, security support, and technical support to keep your project running smoothly.
faq.a3: Absolutely! We can make AI features inside your systems, applications and websites. Not only useful features but also scam and threat detections can be installed by our team.
faq.a4: Our free consultation includes project scope analysis, technology recommendations, timeline estimates, and a detailed proposal with transparent pricing.
faq.a5: Yes! We love working with startups and understand the unique challenges they face. We offer flexible payment options and scalable solutions that grow with your business.
faq.a6: We use modern, proven technologies including React, Node.js, Python, Django, Java script, Flutter, C++ and more. We choose the best tech stack for each project's specific needs.
